channel.title: Just In
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026, Australian Broadcasting Corporation. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Regional Victorians flip national flag upside-down in protest at 'neglect'
item.description: Unhappy Victorians are flying upside-down Australian flags in political protest, but what exactly does it mean, and what do their neighbours think?
item.dc:creator: Coco Veldkamp, Tyrone Dalton, Jane Nield , and Warwick Long

media:group.media:description: This sign in a paddock displays the phrase "Make Australia Great Again".

item.title: Season-defining VAR call causes division in EPL
item.description: Another late goal and a controversial VAR call have helped Arsenal stay in control of the Premier League title race, while delivering another blow to relegation-threatened West Ham United.

media:group.media:description: The referee picked out just one foul amid this chaos.

item.title: 'Time is now' for charging expansion as EV buzz builds
item.description: South Australia's RAA says now is the time to expand EV charging infrastructure to ensure it meets growing demand, which represented about one-sixth of new vehicle sales in April.
item.dc:creator: Josh Brine and Becc Bird

media:group.media:description: Wattle Range Council CEO Ben Gower with his electric vehicle.

item.title: Writing a resume? These common mistakes can land you in the ‘no’ pile
item.description: Here's what three experts recommend you don't put in your resume for the best chance of securing an interview or landing a role.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chisholm

media:group.media:description: Experts say there is information that should be included and omitted when putting a resume together.

item.title: Fowler one-ups Kerr to reach FA Cup final
item.description: Mary Fowler's goal kick-started Manchester City's FA Cup comeback to down Sam Kerr's Chelsea and set up a final against Brighton, led by former Socceroo Dario Vidošić.

media:group.media:description: Mary Fowler (left) and Khadija Shaw (right) both scored to help Manchester City into the final.

item.title: 'I wasn't weak': NSW Health worker wins $50k in discrimination case
item.description: An admin officer has been awarded more than $50,000 in compensation after a tribunal found a NSW Health agency discriminated against her due to her disability.
item.dc:creator: Phoebe Pin

media:group.media:description: Soneva Donald-Stanton has won a disability discrimination case against a NSW Health agency.

item.title: Tech giant Apple joins investors pouring millions into macadamias
item.description: Global investment firms backed by some of the biggest companies in the world are pouring money into acquiring carbon-saving "natural capital assets".
item.dc:creator: Tayla Larsen

media:group.media:description: The Project Paradise orchard spans almost 1,800 hectares.

item.title: Live: PM says Liberals and Nationals legitimised One Nation at Farrer by-election
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese says the Liberals and Nationals made a "big mistake" in legitimising One Nation at the Farrer by-election. Follow live.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Boscaini

media:group.media:description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese, speaks to the media during a press conference at Parliament House in Canberra

item.title: Jay Vine 'lucky' after 'really scary' stage two Giro crash
item.description: Jay Vine's wife Bre takes to social media to express thanks for everyone's support following her husband's sickening fall at the Giro d'Italia.
item.dc:creator: Simon Smale

media:group.media:description: There is no timescale for Jay Vine's return to action.

item.title: Regulator found sex offender exempt from needing Working With Children Check
item.description: A sex offender serving as the president of a Melbourne charity received an exemption from requiring a Working with Children Check by Victoria's child safety regulator last year.
item.dc:creator: Nate Woodall

media:group.media:description: San Maung Saw Wah, the president of Melbourne Karen Buddhist Association.

item.title: Live: Wall Street hits new highs while ASX set to slip
item.description: More strong earnings news, demand for AI stocks and positive jobs data drove Wall Street higher. However, the ASX is set to slip today. Follow the day's events and insights from our business reporters on the ABC News live markets blog.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Letts

media:group.media:description: Traders work on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange.

item.title: Live: Trump calls Iran's response to peace proposal 'unacceptable'
item.description: Donald Trump rejects Iran's response to a US peace plan as "totally unacceptable" as drone attacks target Gulf Arab nations. Follow live.

media:group.media:description: Vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, Musandam, Oman, May 8, 2026. REUTERS/Stringer

item.title: Iran's response interrupts Trump's tee times, meme streams
item.description: The constant trading of insults has the region on edge, but the muted response to missile being lobbed points to a different pose, writes our correspondent Matthew Doran.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Doran

media:group.media:description: ABC Middle East correspondent Matthew Doran in Jerusalem

item.title: How a junior gymnastics club dispute became the national sport's problem
item.description: The Queensland club's management denies allegations of "bullying, conflicts of interest, and a lack of financial transparency" as the conflict reaches the upper echelon of the sport.
item.dc:creator: Owen Jacques

media:group.media:description: The Maroochy Beach Gymnastics club is grappling with concerns and complaints raised by a group of members.

item.title: Fire service 'not fit for purpose' in regional SA, uncovered report finds
item.description: An ex-fire chief found SA's Metropolitan Fire Service risks being "completely dysfunctional" due to below-minimum training and facilities, according to Freedom of Information documents.
item.dc:creator: George Yankovich

media:group.media:description: Former Tasmania Fire Service chief Dermot Barry carried out a confidential review of the Metropolitan Fire Service, which can be revealed for the first time.

item.title: Bondi royal commission to hear challenge to antisemitism definition
item.description: A royal commission sparked by the Bondi terror attack is this week expected to hear from groups who challenge the commission's accepted definition of antisemitism, as well as expert witnesses from the United Kingdom.
item.dc:creator: Phoebe Pin

media:group.media:description: The Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion is continuing.

item.title: 'Nuisance' showers for much of Queensland and 'unseasonable' rain in the west
item.description: The weather bureau says cooler morning temperatures in Queensland have been put on pause, with scattered showers expected across the week.

media:group.media:description: The cool change will be put on pause as scattered showers fall across much of the state this week.

item.title: 'Incredibly concerned': Zero dog fighting-related charges laid in years
item.description: Experts say dog fighting is going under the radar in Queensland following administrative changes to the state's Animal Care and Protection Act.
item.dc:creator: Eden Gillespie

media:group.media:description: A dog fighting and cock fighting unit was formed in 2017 and sat within RSPCA Queensland, staffed by three officers.

item.title: Icebreaker's costly refuelling detour could take years to fix
item.description: A costly refuelling saga affecting Australia's Antarctic icebreaker might not be resolved for another three years under most options, internal government documents reveal.
item.dc:creator: Jano Gibson

media:group.media:description: Front on view of RSV Nuyina, AAD research and supply icebreaker ship.

item.title: An 'outside the square' Bledisloe Cup idea can be a win for Aussie rugby
item.description: Australian rugby lacks a marquee event that captures the national imagination each year, but this could change if a bold Bledisloe Cup proposal gets approval.
item.dc:creator: Luke Pentony

media:group.media:description: The Wallabies and All Blacks could face each other on Anzac Day in the coming years.

item.title: 'Do or die': Flick's journey from jail to artist and First Nations mentor
item.description: A day after her 18th birthday, Flick Chafer-Smith hit rock bottom when she was sent to jail. She found salvation through art.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Ferrier

media:group.media:description: Flick Chafer-Smith spent six years in and out of jail before finding a different pathway through art.

item.title: $100m plan to use AI to speed up housing
item.description: Artificial intelligence will be recruited to speed up assessments of housing and energy projects waiting for environmental approval, as the government races to build more homes and ward off a key frustration turning voters away from the major parties.
item.dc:creator: Jake Evans

media:group.media:description: Housing reforms are tipped to be a key measure of the federal budget.

item.title: A tropical tax paradise sells much of Australia's gas
item.description: Amid renewed debate over whether Australia is getting enough tax from its gas exports, an investigation by the ABC shows how resource giants use shell companies to shift profit.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Mercer and Neil Chenoweth

item.title: Australian plane gave 'critical' information as Russian jets flew over Estonia
item.description: A European official says they'd be "very happy" if Australia deployed the Wedgetail aircraft again, after it played an important role as NATO responded to an incursion of Russian jets over Estonia.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Dziedzic

media:group.media:description: Australia's E-7A Wedgetail aircraft have a radar with a range of 400 kilometres.

item.title: Inside the course targeting young tradies with get-rich schemes
item.description: "Escape the 9-5" content is blowing up on social media, but people who have gotten caught up in it warn of the costs.
item.dc:creator: Alice Angeloni

media:group.media:description: Billy* is an apprentice carpenter from Western Australia who signed up for ABC Academy.
